assembly_post_creates_movements.description: POST assembly creates ASSEMBLY_CONSUME for components and ASSEMBLY_PRODUCE for result

assembly_reverse_creates_movements.description: REVERSE assembly creates opposite movements to restore stock

business_rules_verified.ssot_inventory: stock_movements is the single source of truth for inventory
business_rules_verified.no_direct_stock_edit: Assembly does not directly edit stock, only creates movements
business_rules_verified.reversal_pattern: POSTED transactions can only be corrected via REVERSAL, not DELETE

cancel_behavior.draft_assembly: Can be soft-deleted (status=CANCELLED), no stock impact
cancel_behavior.posted_assembly: Cannot be deleted, must use REVERSAL endpoint
